name: Ragusa Minerals Limited
summary: Ragusa Minerals Limited, a gold exploration and development company, focuses on identifying gold deposits. It holds a 100% interest in the Lonely Mine Gold Project comprising four granted tenements covering an areas of 44 hectares located in the Bubi Greenstone Belt in Zimbabwe. The company was formerly known as SIV Asset Management Limited and changed its name to Ragusa Minerals Limited in October 2020. Ragusa Minerals Limited was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Perth, Australia.
